articles.title: A Politician's Fight for a New Law in Scotland
articles.summary: In Scotland, a politician named Liam McArthur tried to pass a new law about assisted dying, which means letting very sick adults choose to end their life with medical help. The law was for people who are terminally ill and have less than six months to live. But the Scottish Parliament voted against it, with 69 votes against and 57 votes for it. McArthur was sad after the vote but said the issue is not going away because many people support it. He believes more people will want this law as more suffer from bad deaths. The bill would have made it legal for doctors to give a special drug to patients. This is the third time such a bill has been discussed in Scotland, but it did not pass. Politicians voted freely without being told by their parties how to vote.

articles.title: Angela Rayner's Big Speech About Labour Party
articles.summary: Angela Rayner gave a speech to Labour activists. She is a former deputy prime minister. She talked about the Labour Party's problems. She said the party is running out of time. She wants the party to be bold and help working people. This speech makes people think she might want to be the leader instead of Sir Keir Starmer. She spoke in a pub in Westminster. Her words were strong and critical. She did not name Sir Keir, but it was clear she was talking about him. This has started more talk about who should lead the party.

articles.title: Ukraine's Missile Problem During Middle East War
articles.summary: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky says Ukraine might not have enough missiles to fight Russia because of the war in the Middle East. In an interview with the BBC, he explains that Russia's leader, Vladimir Putin, wants a long war between the US, Israel, and Iran because it helps Russia. When the US sends missiles to the Middle East, Ukraine gets fewer. Zelensky says this is bad for Ukraine because it makes peace talks harder and energy prices higher. He also talks about US President Donald Trump, who wants to help end the war but doesn't take sides. Zelensky hopes Trump and UK leader Sir Keir Starmer can work together to support Ukraine. The Middle East war has used many missiles quickly, and Ukraine worries about running out.

articles.title: Morocco Wins Soccer Trophy After Senegal Leaves Game
articles.summary: Morocco has been named the winner of the Africa Cup of Nations soccer tournament after a big change. Senegal beat Morocco in the final game, but Senegal's players left the field during the match because they were upset about a penalty call. After a delay, they came back and won the game. However, the soccer rules say that if a team leaves without permission, they lose. So, the Confederation of African Football decided to give the trophy to Morocco instead, with a 3-0 win. Senegal is unhappy and plans to appeal this decision. This shows how important it is to follow rules in sports.

articles.title: How a War Affects Shipping and Trade
articles.summary: A war with Iran is making businesses and shipping companies worried about problems in the global supply chain. This means things like higher costs for shipping and delays in getting goods. So far, big ports in the U.S., like the Port of Los Angeles, are working normally. But people are unsure how long this will last because tensions are rising in the Middle East. Gene Seroka, who runs the Port of Los Angeles, says we are already seeing some effects. For example, about 2,000 ships that usually go through the Strait of Hormuz are not moving, and the price of ship fuel has more than doubled in a few weeks. Most trade between Asia and the U.S. is still smooth, but it is a slower time after Lunar New Year. Everyone is watching to see if more disruptions will happen.

articles.title: Venezuela Plays USA in Big Baseball Game
articles.summary: The United States and Venezuela are playing in the championship game of the World Baseball Classic, which is like a World Cup for baseball. This is the first time Venezuela has ever reached the final in this tournament. The game is exciting because it has top players from Major League Baseball on both teams. The U.S. team was expected to win because they have many star players, but they almost didn't make it to the final. Venezuela's team is strong and has worked hard to get here. The tournament has had many close games and surprises over two weeks. Fans are watching to see who will win the big trophy.
